user_system_path: Master Audit #445, Pass 2 (Database & data integrity). Verdict PASS: cross-checked the live schema read-only — 21/26 tables user-scoped with user_id-leading indexes (5 non-user by design), composite hot-path indexes match query shapes, reprocessing dedupe via UNIQUE(user_id, content_hash) on tkg_signals, tkg_actions reconstructs before->verdict->after->source, all schema via committed migrations. One low gap: cost_events lacks a user_id index (D-3, tracked). Shipped tests/database/__tests__/data-integrity.test.ts (6 invariants) + docs/database/DATA_INTEGRITY.md. Tests + docs + control-plane only. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 2 is a read-only schema audit + guard test + findings doc: only docs/** and tests/** (plus control-plane) may change. The cost_events index (D-3) is a schema change deferred to its own seam.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, lib, schema, or deps changes in Pass 2. Findings are logged in #445 and routed where they belong.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run tests/database/__tests__/data-integrity.test.ts
required_browser_proof: N/A — read-only schema audit + deterministic test, no user-facing surface changed.
acceptance_condition: Every user-scoped table's user_id + index coverage is proven (recorded in docs/database/DATA_INTEGRITY.md), idempotency dedupe + receipt reconstruction confirmed, the data-integrity contract test passes (6/6 green), findings logged in #445, control plane names #445 consistently, gate:continuity passes.
anti_regression_checks: no app/api/lib/schema/deps files changed (tests + docs only)
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 2 is merged, the Pass 2 box is checked in #445, and the next seam is named.
next_command: Continue the audit: Pass 4 (Backend/runtime — carries C-2 directive_retry) or the frontend passes 6-8, OR the deferred cost P0.2 lazy generation. Owner-side: enable Supabase leaked-password protection + MFA.
